ddls:
CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block on the blockchain */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block */,
  "block_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the block was created */,
  "blockchain_network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_blockchain_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("blockchain_network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., cryptocurrency, NFT) */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Class of the asset (e.g., cryptocurrency, collectible) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the asset */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block where the trade was recorded */,
  "forward_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forward asset being sold */,
  "forward_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the forward asset being sold */,
  "backward_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backward asset being purchased */,
  "backward_quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the backward asset being purchased */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "exchange_interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange interface used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_forward_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("forward_asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_backward_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("backward_asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_exchange_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_interface_id") REFERENCES exchange_interfaces ("exchange_interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_interfaces" (
  "exchange_interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange interface */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of the exchange (e.g., cryptocurrency, traditional) */,
  "exchange_fee" REAL /* Fee charged by the exchange */,
  "exchange_url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_networks" (
  "blockchain_network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of the blockchain network (e.g., public, private) */,
  "network_fee" REAL /* Fee charged by the blockchain network */,
  "network_url" TEXT /* URL of the blockchain network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blockchain_network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, investor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Account balance of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_profit" REAL /* Profit earned by the user from the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "blockchain_network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain network */,
  "market_data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was retrieved */,
  "market_data_value" REAL /* Value of the market data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "market_data_type" TEXT /* Type of the market data (e.g., price, volume) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_blockchain_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("blockchain_network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "wallet_address" TEXT /* Address of the wallet */,
  "wallet_balance" REAL /* Balance of the wallet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallet_assets" (
  "wallet_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet asset */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "asset_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset in the wallet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallet_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallet_assets_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_profit" REAL /* Profit earned by the user from the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., trade, order) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, trade) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
